channel.title: Tinderfessions
channel.description: Anonymous dating stories, plot twists, and first-date chaos.

item.title: He brought a PowerPoint to the first date
item.description: There were twelve slides, three transitions, and one deeply concerning five-year plan.

item.title: The eleven-minute date
item.description: A record-breaking exit involving a fake phone call, a real fire alarm, and absolutely no chemistry.

item.title: I accidentally became his emergency contact
item.description: One typo, a confused receptionist, and the least romantic second date imaginable.
